title: Throw Your Axes
description: This mod allows you to throw your axes.
body:
### Anyone who is still on v1.0.0, please update to v1.0.1 otherwise your anvil isn't gonna work.

# Description
**This mod allows you to throw your axes.**

## Usage
When your attack is _**not** on cooldown_, you can **hold** the **use** button to **charge**, and **release** it to **throw**.

The **longer** you charge, the **faster** it travels, and deals **60%~150%** of the axe's damage.

Each throw consumes **1 durability**. 

You can see the axe's outline within **5 blocks**.

## Attribute
**A new attribute is added for one of the enchantments.**

### Vulnerability
This attribute **increases** all damage taken by the entity.

## Enchantments
**This mod adds 5 new enchantments to enhance the throw. Unless otherwise stated, the enchantments only apply to axes.**

### Bonding (Max Level I)
You can see the axe's **outline** within **40 blocks**, and your movement speed is **increased** by **15%** when you are moving **towards** it.

If you stop moving towards it, the speed boost will gradually **decay** over **1 second**.

***

### Impact (Max Level IV)
After hitting an entity with a **thrown** axe, the entity will suffer from **6/9/12/15%** **slowness** and **12/16/20/24% vulnerability** for **8 seconds**.

If the axe misses and hits an object, entities within **8** blocks from the axe will suffer from **half** of the slowness for **4** seconds.

***

### Well Prepared (Max Level V)
The axe gains **2/3/4/5/6 tokens**. Every time you throw your axe, a **token** will be **consumed** and you will **not** lose your axe.

After **picking up** an axe thrown by this enchantment, the corresponding axe **recovers** a token.

**Incompatible with Mending**

***

### Mastery (Max Level III)
The time required to charge up to the **throwing threshold** and b are both reduced by **0.05/0.1/0.15** seconds.

You can start charging when your **attack cooldown** reaches **80/65/50%**. The **charge slowness penalty** is **reduced** by **20/35/50%**.

Your axe will only lose 1 durability when it's used as a melee weapon.

***

### Sniping (Max Level III)
**Applies to:** Ranged weapons  
**Description:** When you shoot or throw a projectile and hit an entity outside 15 blocks, the longer the distance between the shoot/throw position and the hit position is, the more damage the projectile deals.  

# Dependency
- [Timed Modifiers API (required)](https://modrinth.com/project/UsIu1tnt)
- [DuskyWisp's Library (required)](https://modrinth.com/mod/duskywisps-library)

# MISC
Please report any bugs to **Github** or this **email address**: heinok.chow@gmail.com

The **compatibility** between this mod and other mods are **not** tested.

You can **only** throw axes, sorry, I only feel like doing throwable axes for now. Or maybe swords on a good day, we'll see.

This mod will **not** be backported to **older** versions until I finally figure out how the rendering works. 

This mod is currently for **Fabric** only.
